descriptions.text:
Super Skweek is a game inspired by the wide success of Chip's Challenge, and shares some elements of that puzzler while combining other elements from games such as Pengo.

In Super Skweek, you play the title character who must walk around and either paint all the tiles of the game board pink, complete a specific mission, or both. Some tiles react in various ways when you walk on them, like exploding.

Unlike Chip's Challenge, the game plays in realtime and you can pick up and use weapons to keep away certain monsters as you paint the tiles. There is also a shop you can enter to purchase items. Finally, levels have a time limit for completion.

Super Skweek is a puzzle video game developed and published by the French company Loriciel. The game was released on multiple platforms in the early 1990s as a follow-up to 1989's Skweek (released as Slider in 1991 in the United States).

Skweek — parfois appelé Slider — est un jeu vidéo paru en 1989. Conçu par Laurent Arditi et Stéphane Ducasse, il fut à l'origine commercialisé par l'éditeur français Loriciel pour les ordinateurs personnels Amiga, Atari ST et Amstrad CPC. Des adaptations sont parues en 1991 sur les consoles PC Engine de NEC et Game Gear de Sega.
En 2013, Skweek a été adapté sur iOS (Apple iPhone, iPad, iPod Touch).
Le jeu est fortement inspiré d'un autre jeu sorti en 1987 en arcade : Mustache Boy.
